methodology.return_definition: simple close-to-close returns computed inside each frozen window
methodology.realized_volatility_definition: sample standard deviation of log returns annualized by timeframe
methodology.volume_definition: base-unit volume and close*volume quote-notional proxy quantiles
methodology.ranking_definition: descending metric value with deterministic alphabetical tie break
methodology.timeframe_coherence_definition: exact UTC 4h OHLC aggregation from four 1h candles, volume within floating tolerance, plus no-tie Kendall rank concordance across 1h and 4h
